message:
refactor,test(batch): clarify topological sort and enhance status assertions

Refactor in-degree calculation in topological_tiers for clarity: accumulate
degree first, then insert once. Fix log-formatting bug in batch operation
loop. Enhance test assertions to validate tier structure and check individual
operation status values (Success/Error/Skipped) instead of aggregate counts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
